title: Times and dates for spring 2026 commencement
summary_en: This spring, more than 6,100 University of Iowa students will receive their degrees during commencement ceremonies, beginning with the College of PharmacyвАЩs Doctor of Pharmacy ceremony on May 14 and concluding with the College of Dentistry ceremony on June 5.

title: Iowa alumni win 2026 Pulitzer Prizes for memoir, fiction
summary_en: Two University of Iowa alumni have won 2026 Pulitzer Prizes, and two more were named finalists вАФ with Yiyun Li and Daniel Kraus joining a distinguished list of more than 40 Iowa-affiliated Pulitzer winners.
title_cn: [еЊЕзњїиѓС] Iowa alumni win 2026 Pulitzer Prizes for memoir, fiction
